item.title: Why you should use Firefox instead of Chrome
item.author: Author
item.description: Google has been collecting enough of your data. I used to thought that YouTube recommending me the relevant videos that I really love seeing is a great thing, and when I slide left on my Android phone to look at Google Now, I can see all the news relevant to me which is really convenient. Until one day, I read an article about how the Internet now is unlike years ago when it was created - a space where everyone can have an identity, independent of their real life.
